name: Bennet Underbough

features.name: Lucky
features.detail: Reroll natural 1s on attacks, checks, saves (keep new roll)

features.name: Brave
features.detail: Advantage on saves vs being frightened

features.name: Naturally Stealthy
features.detail: Can hide behind creatures one size larger

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.detail: Healing spells restore +2 + spell level HP

known.name: Sacred Flame
known.detail: DEX save DC 13 or 1d8 radiant; no cover benefit

known.name: Guidance
known.detail: Touch, concentration: +1d4 to one ability check

known.name: Spare the Dying
known.detail: Touch: stabilize a creature at 0 HP

known.name: Bless
known.detail: 3 creatures +1d4 on attacks and saves; concentration 1 min

known.name: Guiding Bolt
known.detail: +5 vs AC, 4d6 radiant; next attack vs target has advantage

traits: Hums old hymns while working; can't help patching people up.
ideals: Nobody should die cold and unremembered.
bonds: The little shrine that raised them was shuttered for lack of a keeper.
flaws: Trusts a sad story far too easily.

notes: Starter pregen — rename, reflavor, or replace during session 0. Add this sheet's id to state/current.json party[] to seat them at the table. Life Domain per SRD; domain spells (Bless, Cure Wounds) always prepared.
